languages.text: {n}Когда вы уходите со стрельбища, вас сопровождают уважительные кивки, выкрики и даже дружеские хлопки по плечам. Судя по всему, вы сумели завоевать десяток сердец.{/n}
{n}When you leave the shooting range, your departure is accompanied by respectful nods, shouts, and even friendly pats on the shoulder. It seems you have won over some of the Merovians.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Когда вы уходите со стрельбища, вас сопровождают уважительные кивки, выкрики и даже дружеские хлопки по плечам. Судя по всему, вы сумели завоевать десяток сердец.{/n}

languages.text: {n}訓練場を離れる時、敬意を表した頷きや叫び声、さらには親しみを込めて肩を叩く声まで聞こえてくる。メロヴィング家の者の中には、君を気に入った者もいるようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you leave the training ground, your departure is accompanied by respectful nods, shouts, and even friendly pats on the shoulder. It seems you have won over some of the Merovians.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Poligondan ayrıldığında saygılı baş selamları, bağırışlar ve hatta omuza dostça dokunuşlar eşliğinde uğurlanıyorsun. Anlaşılan bazı Merovluları kazanmayı başardın.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you leave the shooting range, your departure is accompanied by respectful nods, shouts, and even friendly pats on the shoulder. It seems you have won over some of the Merovians.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Poligondan ayrıldığında saygılı baş selamları, bağırışlar ve hatta omuza dostça dokunuşlar eşliğinde uğurlanıyorsun. Anlaşılan bazı Merovluları kazanmayı başardın.{/n}

languages.text: {n}当你离开射击场时，周围的人纷纷点头致意，为你呼喊，甚至有人友好地拍了拍你的肩膀。看来你赢得了一部分梅罗夫人的认可。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you leave the shooting range, your departure is accompanied by respectful nods, shouts, and even friendly pats on the shoulder. It seems you have won over some of the Merovians.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}当你离开射击场时，周围的人纷纷点头致意，为你呼喊，甚至有人友好地拍了拍你的肩膀。看来你赢得了一部分梅罗夫人的认可。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als du den Schießstand verlässt, erntest du respektvolles Nicken, anerkennende Rufe und sogar den ein oder anderen freundlichen Klaps auf die Schulter. Du scheinst einige der Merovianer für dich gewonnen zu haben.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you leave the shooting range, your departure is accompanied by respectful nods, shouts, and even friendly pats on the shoulder. It seems you have won over some of the Merovians.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Als du den Schießstand verlässt, erntest du respektvolles Nicken, anerkennende Rufe und sogar den ein oder anderen freundlichen Klaps auf die Schulter. Du scheinst einige der Merovianer für dich gewonnen zu haben.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Lorsque vous quittez le stand de tir, votre départ est accompagné de hochements de tête approbateurs, de cris et même de petites tapes amicales sur l'épaule. Vous avez visiblement conquis certains des Meroviens.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you leave the shooting range, your departure is accompanied by respectful nods, shouts, and even friendly pats on the shoulder. It seems you have won over some of the Merovians.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Lorsque vous quittez le stand de tir, votre départ est accompagné de hochements de tête approbateurs, de cris et même de petites tapes amicales sur l'épaule. Vous avez visiblement conquis certains des Meroviens.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Cuando te alejas del campo de tiro, te acompañan inclinaciones respetuosas, gritos de alabanza e incluso palmaditas en la espalda. Parece que te has ganado a algunos de los merovianos.{/n}
